plan: Trim SPY to 20% to reduce concentration and meet the mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate leveraged ETF exposure and cut losses.
Increase QQQI to 25% for more income and broad index exposure.
Buy NOW at 5% for a high-quality, strong scanner setup.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation and reduces overall portfolio risk significantly.
conservative.read: This conservative plan targets a modest ~1.5% monthly return with a focus on capital preservation. Expect significantly lower volatility and drawdown risk. Returns will be steady but potentially slower.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to comply with concentration limits.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to remove underperforming leveraged ETFs.
Increase QQQI to 22% to balance growth with income stability.
Buy NOW at 8% and ANET at 5% to add high-quality tech with strong scanner reads.
This plan balances risk and growth, maintaining a moderate cash buffer.
balanced.read: This balanced plan aims for ~2.5% monthly growth with a risk-first approach. It reduces leverage and concentration, offering a more stable growth profile than your current book. Expect moderate volatility.

plan: Trim SPY to 25% to meet the concentration mandate.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL, as they are below stops and underperforming.
Increase CRWD to 20% to press a winning AI position.
Buy NOW at 10% for its top scanner score and high risk/reward.
Buy TECL at 10% to add leveraged tech exposure from a strong setup.
This plan uses leverage and concentration in high-conviction setups for aggressive growth.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan targets ~4% monthly growth by leaning into leverage and high-scoring setups. Be aware of significantly higher drawdown risk and the daily decay/rebalancing of leveraged ETFs. Strict stop discipline is crucial.

plan: Trim SPY to 20% to meet concentration limits and reduce overall market exposure.
Sell all SOXL and SPAL to eliminate all leveraged ETF exposure.
Trim CRWD and SMH to 5% each to reduce high-beta and sector concentration.
Increase QQQI to 40% to prioritize steady monthly income distributions.
This plan focuses on generating reliable income with minimal growth-oriented risk.
income.read: This income plan targets ~1% monthly yield, prioritizing steady distributions and low drawdown. While aiming for cash-like income, NAV can still fall in selloffs, and distributions are variable. Expect very low volatility.
